message:
fix: emit missing event data for resume/history reconstruction

- Add assistant_message to plan_end events (needed by resume.ts)
- Add tool_result_message to primitive_end events (needed by resume.ts)
- Add tool_result_message to act_end events (needed by resume.ts)
- Fix error event field: use data.error instead of data.message
  (matches render-event.ts expectation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
